message:
fix(core): correct float formatting for extreme/subnormal values and time edge cases

Printf formatting (%f, %e):
- Avoid u64 saturation for large floats (values > 1.8e19) by using
  round() + Display instead of direct casting
- Handle subnormal float exponents with iterative scaling to avoid
  10^exp underflow that produced incorrect mantissa digits

Time module:
- Minor boundary case handling improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
